page_content:
MUSC248 Selected Topics in Music (1-3 Credits)

Designed to allow a student of theory or music history to pursue a specialized topic or project under the supervision of a faculty member. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

MUSC250 Advanced Theory of Music | (4 Credits)

A continuation of MUSC 151, with further study of chromatic and modulatory techniques of the nineteenth century. Emphasis on sight singing, ear training, analysis and compositional skills.
